ghci> type role Control.Applicative.WrappedArrow representational nominal nominal
type Control.Applicative.WrappedArrow :: (* -> * -> *)
                                         -> * -> * -> *
newtype Control.Applicative.WrappedArrow a b c
  = Control.Applicative.WrapArrow {Control.Applicative.unwrapArrow :: a b
                                                                        c}
type role Control.Applicative.WrappedMonad representational nominal
type Control.Applicative.WrappedMonad :: (* -> *) -> * -> *
newtype Control.Applicative.WrappedMonad m a
  = Control.Applicative.WrapMonad {Control.Applicative.unwrapMonad :: m a}
type Control.Applicative.ZipList :: * -> *
newtype Control.Applicative.ZipList a
  = Control.Applicative.ZipList {Control.Applicative.getZipList :: [a]}
Control.Applicative.optional ::
  GHC.Base.Alternative f => f a -> f (Maybe a)
type Functor :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Functor f where
  ...
  (<$) :: a -> f b -> f a
(<$>) :: Functor f => (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
(GHC.Base.<**>) :: Applicative f => f a -> f (a -> b) -> f b
type GHC.Base.Alternative :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Applicative f => GHC.Base.Alternative f where
  GHC.Base.empty :: f a
  (GHC.Base.<|>) :: f a -> f a -> f a
  GHC.Base.some :: f a -> f [a]
  GHC.Base.many :: f a -> f [a]
  {-# MINIMAL empty, (<|>) #-}
type Applicative :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Functor f => Applicative f where
  pure :: a -> f a
  (<*>) :: f (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
  liftA2 :: (a -> b -> c) -> f a -> f b -> f c
  (*>) :: f a -> f b -> f b
  (<*) :: f a -> f b -> f a
  {-# MINIMAL pure, ((<*>) | liftA2) #-}
type role Data.Functor.Const.Const representational phantom
type Data.Functor.Const.Const :: forall {k}. * -> k -> *
newtype Data.Functor.Const.Const a b
  = Data.Functor.Const.Const {Data.Functor.Const.getConst :: a}
Data.Foldable.asum ::
  (Foldable t, GHC.Base.Alternative f) => t (f a) -> f a
GHC.Base.liftA :: Applicative f => (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
GHC.Base.liftA3 ::
  Applicative f => (a -> b -> c -> d) -> f a -> f b -> f c -> f d

ghci> (Control.Arrow.<<^) ::
  Control.Arrow.Arrow a => a c d -> (b -> c) -> a b d
(Control.Arrow.>>^) ::
  Control.Arrow.Arrow a => a b c -> (c -> d) -> a b d
type Control.Arrow.Arrow :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint
class Control.Category.Category a => Control.Arrow.Arrow a where
  Control.Arrow.arr :: (b -> c) -> a b c
  Control.Arrow.first :: a b c -> a (b, d) (c, d)
  Control.Arrow.second :: a b c -> a (d, b) (d, c)
  (Control.Arrow.***) :: a b c -> a b' c' -> a (b, b') (c, c')
  (Control.Arrow.&&&) :: a b c -> a b c' -> a b (c, c')
  {-# MINIMAL arr, (first | (***)) #-}
type Control.Arrow.ArrowApply :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint
class Control.Arrow.Arrow a => Control.Arrow.ArrowApply a where
  Control.Arrow.app :: a (a b c, b) c
  {-# MINIMAL app #-}
type Control.Arrow.ArrowChoice :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint
class Control.Arrow.Arrow a => Control.Arrow.ArrowChoice a where
  Control.Arrow.left :: a b c -> a (Either b d) (Either c d)
  Control.Arrow.right :: a b c -> a (Either d b) (Either d c)
  (Control.Arrow.+++) :: a b c
                         -> a b' c' -> a (Either b b') (Either c c')
  (Control.Arrow.|||) :: a b d -> a c d -> a (Either b c) d
  {-# MINIMAL (left | (+++)) #-}
type Control.Arrow.ArrowLoop :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint
class Control.Arrow.Arrow a => Control.Arrow.ArrowLoop a where
  Control.Arrow.loop :: a (b, d) (c, d) -> a b c
  {-# MINIMAL loop #-}
type role Control.Arrow.ArrowMonad representational nominal
type Control.Arrow.ArrowMonad :: (* -> * -> *) -> * -> *
newtype Control.Arrow.ArrowMonad a b
  = Control.Arrow.ArrowMonad (a () b)
type Control.Arrow.ArrowPlus :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint
class Control.Arrow.ArrowZero a => Control.Arrow.ArrowPlus a where
  (Control.Arrow.<+>) :: a b c -> a b c -> a b c
  {-# MINIMAL (<+>) #-}
type Control.Arrow.ArrowZero :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint
class Control.Arrow.Arrow a => Control.Arrow.ArrowZero a where
  Control.Arrow.zeroArrow :: a b c
  {-# MINIMAL zeroArrow #-}

  forall {k} (cat :: k -> k -> *) (b :: k) (c :: k) (a :: k).
  Control.Category.Category cat =>
  cat b c -> cat a b -> cat a c

  forall {k} (cat :: k -> k -> *) (a :: k) (b :: k) (c :: k).
  Control.Category.Category cat =>
  cat a b -> cat b c -> cat a c

                                  (k -> k -> *) -> Constraint

  Control.Category.id :: forall (a :: k). cat a a
  (Control.Category..) :: forall (b :: k) (c :: k) (a :: k).
                          cat b c -> cat a b -> cat a c
  {-# MINIMAL id, (.) #-}

  (Foldable t, Monad m) => (b -> a -> m b) -> b -> t a -> m b

  (Foldable t, Monad m) => (b -> a -> m b) -> b -> t a -> m ()

type Functor :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Functor f where
  fmap :: (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
  (<$) :: a -> f b -> f a
  {-# MINIMAL fmap #-}
type Monad :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Applicative m => Monad m where
  (>>=) :: m a -> (a -> m b) -> m b
  (>>) :: m a -> m b -> m b
  return :: a -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL (>>=) #-}
type MonadFail :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Monad m => MonadFail m where
  fail :: String -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL fail #-}
type GHC.Base.MonadPlus :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class (GHC.Base.Alternative m, Monad m) =>
      GHC.Base.MonadPlus m where
  GHC.Base.mzero :: m a
  GHC.Base.mplus :: m a -> m a -> m a
GHC.Base.ap :: Monad m => m (a -> b) -> m a -> m b
Data.Traversable.forM ::
  (Traversable t, Monad m) => t a -> (a -> m b) -> m (t b)
Data.Foldable.forM_ ::
  (Foldable t, Monad m) => t a -> (a -> m b) -> m ()
GHC.Base.join :: Monad m => m (m a) -> m a
GHC.Base.liftM :: Monad m => (a1 -> r) -> m a1 -> m r
GHC.Base.liftM2 ::
  Monad m => (a1 -> a2 -> r) -> m a1 -> m a2 -> m r
GHC.Base.liftM3 ::
  Monad m => (a1 -> a2 -> a3 -> r) -> m a1 -> m a2 -> m a3 -> m r
GHC.Base.liftM4 ::
  Monad m =>
  (a1 -> a2 -> a3 -> a4 -> r) -> m a1 -> m a2 -> m a3 -> m a4 -> m r
GHC.Base.liftM5 ::
  Monad m =>
  (a1 -> a2 -> a3 -> a4 -> a5 -> r)
  -> m a1 -> m a2 -> m a3 -> m a4 -> m a5 -> m r
type Traversable :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class (Functor t, Foldable t) => Traversable t where
  ...
  mapM :: Monad m => (a -> m b) -> t a -> m (t b)
  ...
mapM_ :: (Foldable t, Monad m) => (a -> m b) -> t a -> m ()
Data.Foldable.msum ::
  (Foldable t, GHC.Base.MonadPlus m) => t (m a) -> m a
type Traversable :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class (Functor t, Foldable t) => Traversable t where
  ...
  sequence :: Monad m => t (m a) -> m (t a)
sequence_ :: (Foldable t, Monad m) => t (m a) -> m ()
Data.Functor.void :: Functor f => f a -> f ()
GHC.Base.when :: Applicative f => Bool -> f () -> f ()

ghci> --- Package: base | Module: Data.Bifoldable ---
ghci> type Data.Bifoldable.Bifoldable :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint
class Data.Bifoldable.Bifoldable p where
  Data.Bifoldable.bifold :: Monoid m => p m m -> m
  Data.Bifoldable.bifoldMap :: Monoid m =>
                               (a -> m) -> (b -> m) -> p a b -> m
  Data.Bifoldable.bifoldr :: (a -> c -> c)
                             -> (b -> c -> c) -> c -> p a b -> c
  Data.Bifoldable.bifoldl :: (c -> a -> c)
                             -> (c -> b -> c) -> c -> p a b -> c

ghci> --- Package: base | Module: Data.Foldable ---
ghci> type Foldable :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Foldable t where
  Data.Foldable.fold :: Monoid m => t m -> m
  foldMap :: Monoid m => (a -> m) -> t a -> m
  Data.Foldable.foldMap' :: Monoid m => (a -> m) -> t a -> m
  foldr :: (a -> b -> b) -> b -> t a -> b
  Data.Foldable.foldr' :: (a -> b -> b) -> b -> t a -> b
  foldl :: (b -> a -> b) -> b -> t a -> b
  Data.Foldable.foldl' :: (b -> a -> b) -> b -> t a -> b
  foldr1 :: (a -> a -> a) -> t a -> a
  foldl1 :: (a -> a -> a) -> t a -> a
  Data.Foldable.toList :: t a -> [a]
  null :: t a -> Bool
  length :: t a -> Int
  elem :: Eq a => a -> t a -> Bool
  maximum :: Ord a => t a -> a
  minimum :: Ord a => t a -> a
  sum :: Num a => t a -> a
  product :: Num a => t a -> a
  {-# MINIMAL foldMap | foldr #-}
all :: Foldable t => (a -> Bool) -> t a -> Bool
and :: Foldable t => t Bool -> Bool
any :: Foldable t => (a -> Bool) -> t a -> Bool
Data.Foldable.asum ::
  (Foldable t, GHC.Base.Alternative f) => t (f a) -> f a
concat :: Foldable t => t [a] -> [a]
concatMap :: Foldable t => (a -> [b]) -> t a -> [b]
Data.Foldable.find :: Foldable t => (a -> Bool) -> t a -> Maybe a
Data.Foldable.foldlM ::
  (Foldable t, Monad m) => (b -> a -> m b) -> b -> t a -> m b
Data.Foldable.foldrM ::
  (Foldable t, Monad m) => (a -> b -> m b) -> b -> t a -> m b
Data.Foldable.forM_ ::
  (Foldable t, Monad m) => t a -> (a -> m b) -> m ()
Data.Foldable.for_ ::
  (Foldable t, Applicative f) => t a -> (a -> f b) -> f ()
mapM_ :: (Foldable t, Monad m) => (a -> m b) -> t a -> m ()
Data.Foldable.maximumBy ::
  Foldable t => (a -> a -> Ordering) -> t a -> a
Data.Foldable.minimumBy ::
  Foldable t => (a -> a -> Ordering) -> t a -> a
Data.Foldable.msum ::
  (Foldable t, GHC.Base.MonadPlus m) => t (m a) -> m a
notElem :: (Foldable t, Eq a) => a -> t a -> Bool
or :: Foldable t => t Bool -> Bool
Data.Foldable.sequenceA_ ::
  (Foldable t, Applicative f) => t (f a) -> f ()
sequence_ :: (Foldable t, Monad m) => t (m a) -> m ()
Data.Foldable.traverse_ ::
  (Foldable t, Applicative f) => (a -> f b) -> t a -> f ()

class Foldable t => Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t where
  Data.Foldable1.fold1 :: Semigroup m => t m -> m
  Data.Foldable1.foldMap1 :: Semigroup m => (a -> m) -> t a -> m
  Data.Foldable1.foldMap1' :: Semigroup m => (a -> m) -> t a -> m
  Data.Foldable1.toNonEmpty :: t a -> GHC.Base.NonEmpty a
  Data.Foldable1.maximum :: Ord a => t a -> a
  Data.Foldable1.minimum :: Ord a => t a -> a
  Data.Foldable1.head :: t a -> a
  Data.Foldable1.last :: t a -> a
  Data.Foldable1.foldrMap1 :: (a -> b) -> (a -> b -> b) -> t a -> b
  Data.Foldable1.foldlMap1' :: (a -> b) -> (b -> a -> b) -> t a -> b
  Data.Foldable1.foldlMap1 :: (a -> b) -> (b -> a -> b) -> t a -> b
  Data.Foldable1.foldrMap1' :: (a -> b) -> (a -> b -> b) -> t a -> b
  {-# MINIMAL foldMap1 | foldrMap1 #-}

  (a -> a -> m a) -> t a -> m a

  (Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t, Monad m) =>
  (a -> m b) -> (b -> a -> m b) -> t a -> m b

  Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t => (a -> a -> a) -> t a -> a

  Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t => (a -> a -> a) -> t a -> a

  (Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t, Monad m) =>
  (a -> a -> m a) -> t a -> m a

  (Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t, Monad m) =>
  (a -> m b) -> (a -> b -> m b) -> t a -> m b

  (Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t, Semigroup m) => m -> t m -> m

  Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t => (a -> a -> Ordering) -> t a -> a

  Data.Foldable1.Foldable1 t => (a -> a -> Ordering) -> t a -> a

  (<$) :: a -> f b -> f a

class (forall a. Eq a => Eq (f a)) =>
      Data.Functor.Classes.Eq1 f where
  Data.Functor.Classes.liftEq :: (a -> b -> Bool)
                                 -> f a -> f b -> Bool
  default Data.Functor.Classes.liftEq :: (f ~ f' c,
                                          Data.Functor.Classes.Eq2 f', Eq c) =>
                                         (a -> b -> Bool) -> f a -> f b -> Bool
type Data.Functor.Classes.Eq2 :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint

      Data.Functor.Classes.Eq2 f where
  Data.Functor.Classes.liftEq2 :: (a -> b -> Bool)
                                  -> (c -> d -> Bool) -> f a c -> f b d -> Bool
  {-# MINIMAL liftEq2 #-}

class (Data.Functor.Classes.Eq1 f, forall a. Ord a => Ord (f a)) =>
      Data.Functor.Classes.Ord1 f where
  Data.Functor.Classes.liftCompare :: (a -> b -> Ordering)
                                      -> f a -> f b -> Ordering
  default Data.Functor.Classes.liftCompare :: (f ~ f' c,
                                               Data.Functor.Classes.Ord2 f', Ord c) =>
                                              (a -> b -> Ordering) -> f a -> f b -> Ordering

      Data.Functor.Classes.Ord2 f where
  Data.Functor.Classes.liftCompare2 :: (a -> b -> Ordering)

  {-# MINIMAL liftCompare2 #-}

  compare :: a -> a -> Ordering
  (<) :: a -> a -> Bool
  (<=) :: a -> a -> Bool
  (>) :: a -> a -> Bool
  (>=) :: a -> a -> Bool
  max :: a -> a -> a
  min :: a -> a -> a

ghci> --- Package: base | Module: Data.Traversable ---
ghci> type Traversable :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class (Functor t, Foldable t) => Traversable t where
  traverse :: Applicative f => (a -> f b) -> t a -> f (t b)
  sequenceA :: Applicative f => t (f a) -> f (t a)
  mapM :: Monad m => (a -> m b) -> t a -> m (t b)
  sequence :: Monad m => t (m a) -> m (t a)
  {-# MINIMAL traverse | sequenceA #-}
Data.Traversable.fmapDefault ::
  Traversable t => (a -> b) -> t a -> t b
Data.Traversable.foldMapDefault ::
  (Traversable t, Monoid m) => (a -> m) -> t a -> m
Data.Traversable.for ::
  (Traversable t, Applicative f) => t a -> (a -> f b) -> f (t b)
Data.Traversable.forAccumM ::
  (Monad m, Traversable t) =>
  s -> t a -> (s -> a -> m (s, b)) -> m (s, t b)
Data.Traversable.forM ::
  (Traversable t, Monad m) => t a -> (a -> m b) -> m (t b)
Data.Traversable.mapAccumL ::
  Traversable t => (s -> a -> (s, b)) -> s -> t a -> (s, t b)
Data.Traversable.mapAccumM ::
  (Monad m, Traversable t) =>
  (s -> a -> m (s, b)) -> s -> t a -> m (s, t b)
Data.Traversable.mapAccumR ::
  Traversable t => (s -> a -> (s, b)) -> s -> t a -> (s, t b)

ghci> type (Data.Type.Bool.&&) :: Bool -> Bool -> Bool
type family (Data.Type.Bool.&&) a b where
    (Data.Type.Bool.&&) False a = False
    (Data.Type.Bool.&&) True a = a
    (Data.Type.Bool.&&) a False = False
    (Data.Type.Bool.&&) a True = a
    (Data.Type.Bool.&&) a a = a
type Data.Type.Bool.If :: forall {k}. Bool -> k -> k -> k
type family Data.Type.Bool.If cond tru fls where
  forall k (tru :: k) (fls :: k).
    Data.Type.Bool.If True tru fls = tru
  forall k (tru :: k) (fls :: k).
    Data.Type.Bool.If False tru fls = fls
type Data.Type.Bool.Not :: Bool -> Bool
type family Data.Type.Bool.Not a where = res | res -> a
    Data.Type.Bool.Not False = True
    Data.Type.Bool.Not True = False
type (Data.Type.Bool.||) :: Bool -> Bool -> Bool
type family (Data.Type.Bool.||) a b where
    (Data.Type.Bool.||) False a = a
    (Data.Type.Bool.||) True a = True
    (Data.Type.Bool.||) a False = a
    (Data.Type.Bool.||) a True = True
    (Data.Type.Bool.||) a a = a

  Data.Type.Equality.HRefl :: forall {k1} (a :: k1).
                              (Data.Type.Equality.:~~:) a a
type (Data.Type.Equality.==) :: forall k. k -> k -> Bool
type family (Data.Type.Equality.==) a b where
  forall k1 k2 (f :: k1 -> k2) (a :: k1) (g :: k1 -> k2) (b :: k1).
    (Data.Type.Equality.==) (f a) (g b)
      = (f Data.Type.Equality.== g)
        Data.Type.Bool.&& (a Data.Type.Equality.== b)
  forall k (a :: k). (Data.Type.Equality.==) a a = True
  forall k (_1 :: k) (_2 :: k). (Data.Type.Equality.==) _1 _2 = False
type Data.Type.Equality.TestEquality :: forall {k}.
                                        (k -> *) -> Constraint
class Data.Type.Equality.TestEquality f where
  Data.Type.Equality.testEquality :: forall (a :: k) (b :: k).
                                     f a -> f b -> Maybe (a Data.Type.Equality.:~: b)
  {-# MINIMAL testEquality #-}

  forall {k1} {k2} (f :: k1 -> k2) (g :: k1 -> k2) (a :: k1)
         (b :: k1).
  (f Data.Type.Equality.:~: g)
  -> (a Data.Type.Equality.:~: b) -> f a Data.Type.Equality.:~: g b

  (a Data.Type.Equality.:~: b) -> a -> b

  forall {k} (a :: k) (b :: k) r.
  (a Data.Type.Equality.:~: b) -> ((a ~ b) => r) -> r

  forall {k1} {k2} (f :: k1 -> k2) (a :: k1) (g :: k1 -> k2)
         (b :: k1).
  (f a Data.Type.Equality.:~: g b) -> a Data.Type.Equality.:~: b

  forall {k1} {k2} (f :: k1 -> k2) (a :: k1) (g :: k1 -> k2)
         (b :: k1).
  (f a Data.Type.Equality.:~: g b) -> f Data.Type.Equality.:~: g

  (a Data.Type.Equality.:~: b)

ghci> type (Data.Type.Ord.<) :: forall {t}. t -> t -> Constraint
type (Data.Type.Ord.<) x y =
  GHC.TypeError.Assert
    (x Data.Type.Ord.<? y) (Data.Type.Ord.LtErrMsg x y)
  :: Constraint
type (Data.Type.Ord.<=) :: forall {t}. t -> t -> Constraint
type (Data.Type.Ord.<=) x y =
  GHC.TypeError.Assert
    (x Data.Type.Ord.<=? y) (Data.Type.Ord.LeErrMsg x y)
  :: Constraint
type (Data.Type.Ord.<=?) :: forall k. k -> k -> Bool
type (Data.Type.Ord.<=?) m n =
  Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond (Data.Type.Ord.Compare m n) True True False
  :: Bool
type (Data.Type.Ord.<?) :: forall k. k -> k -> Bool
type (Data.Type.Ord.<?) m n =
  Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond (Data.Type.Ord.Compare m n) True False False
  :: Bool
type (Data.Type.Ord.>) :: forall {t}. t -> t -> Constraint
type (Data.Type.Ord.>) x y =
  GHC.TypeError.Assert
    (x Data.Type.Ord.>? y) (Data.Type.Ord.GtErrMsg x y)
  :: Constraint
type (Data.Type.Ord.>=) :: forall {t}. t -> t -> Constraint
type (Data.Type.Ord.>=) x y =
  GHC.TypeError.Assert
    (x Data.Type.Ord.>=? y) (Data.Type.Ord.GeErrMsg x y)
  :: Constraint
type (Data.Type.Ord.>=?) :: forall k. k -> k -> Bool
type (Data.Type.Ord.>=?) m n =
  Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond (Data.Type.Ord.Compare m n) False True True
  :: Bool
type (Data.Type.Ord.>?) :: forall k. k -> k -> Bool
type (Data.Type.Ord.>?) m n =
  Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond (Data.Type.Ord.Compare m n) False False True
  :: Bool
type Data.Type.Ord.Compare :: forall k. k -> k -> Ordering
type family Data.Type.Ord.Compare a b
type Data.Type.Ord.Max :: forall k. k -> k -> k
type Data.Type.Ord.Max m n =
  Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond (Data.Type.Ord.Compare m n) n n m :: k
type Data.Type.Ord.Min :: forall k. k -> k -> k
type Data.Type.Ord.Min m n =
  Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond (Data.Type.Ord.Compare m n) m m n :: k
type Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond :: forall k.
                              Ordering -> k -> k -> k -> k
type family Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond o lt eq gt where
  forall k (lt :: k) (eq :: k) (gt :: k).
    Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond LT lt eq gt = lt
  forall k (lt :: k) (eq :: k) (gt :: k).
    Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond EQ lt eq gt = eq
  forall k (lt :: k) (eq :: k) (gt :: k).
    Data.Type.Ord.OrdCond GT lt eq gt = gt
type role Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI nominal nominal
type Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI :: forall {k}. k -> k -> *
data Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a b where
  Data.Type.Ord.LTI :: forall {k} (a :: k) (b :: k).
                       (Data.Type.Ord.Compare a b ~ LT) =>
                       Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a b
  Data.Type.Ord.EQI :: forall {k} (a :: k).
                       (Data.Type.Ord.Compare a a ~ EQ) =>
                       Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a a
  Data.Type.Ord.GTI :: forall {k} (a :: k) (b :: k).
                       (Data.Type.Ord.Compare a b ~ GT) =>
                       Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a b

ghci> --- Package: base | Module: GHC.Base ---
ghci> ($) :: (a -> b) -> a -> b
($!) :: (a -> b) -> a -> b
(++) :: [a] -> [a] -> [a]
(.) :: (b -> c) -> (a -> b) -> a -> c
(GHC.Base.<**>) :: Applicative f => f a -> f (a -> b) -> f b
(=<<) :: Monad m => (a -> m b) -> m a -> m b
type GHC.Base.Alternative :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Applicative f => GHC.Base.Alternative f where
  GHC.Base.empty :: f a
  (GHC.Base.<|>) :: f a -> f a -> f a
  GHC.Base.some :: f a -> f [a]
  GHC.Base.many :: f a -> f [a]
  {-# MINIMAL empty, (<|>) #-}
type Applicative :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Functor f => Applicative f where
  pure :: a -> f a
  (<*>) :: f (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
  liftA2 :: (a -> b -> c) -> f a -> f b -> f c
  (*>) :: f a -> f b -> f b
  (<*) :: f a -> f b -> f a
  {-# MINIMAL pure, ((<*>) | liftA2) #-}
type Functor :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Functor f where
  fmap :: (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
  (<$) :: a -> f b -> f a
  {-# MINIMAL fmap #-}
type Monad :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Applicative m => Monad m where
  (>>=) :: m a -> (a -> m b) -> m b
  (>>) :: m a -> m b -> m b
  return :: a -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL (>>=) #-}
type GHC.Base.MonadPlus :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class (GHC.Base.Alternative m, Monad m) =>
      GHC.Base.MonadPlus m where
  GHC.Base.mzero :: m a
  GHC.Base.mplus :: m a -> m a -> m a
type Monoid :: * -> Constraint
class Semigroup a => Monoid a where
  mempty :: a
  mappend :: a -> a -> a
  mconcat :: [a] -> a
  {-# MINIMAL mempty | mconcat #-}
type GHC.Base.NonEmpty :: * -> *
data GHC.Base.NonEmpty a = a GHC.Base.:| [a]
type GHC.Base.Opaque :: *
data GHC.Base.Opaque = forall a. GHC.Base.O a
type Semigroup :: * -> Constraint
class Semigroup a where
  (<>) :: a -> a -> a
  GHC.Base.sconcat :: GHC.Base.NonEmpty a -> a
  GHC.Base.stimes :: Integral b => b -> a -> a
  {-# MINIMAL (<>) | sconcat #-}
type String :: *
type String = [Char]
type GHC.Base.Void :: *
data GHC.Base.Void
GHC.Base.absurd :: GHC.Base.Void -> a
GHC.Base.ap :: Monad m => m (a -> b) -> m a -> m b
asTypeOf :: a -> a -> a

  (forall b. (a -> b -> b) -> b -> b) -> [a] -> [a]

(||) :: Bool -> Bool -> Bool
type (~) :: forall k. k -> k -> Constraint
class (a ~ b) => (~) a b
type (~~) :: forall k0 k1. k0 -> k1 -> Constraint
class (a ~~ b) => (~~) a b
ghci> --- Package: base | Module: GHC.Bits ---
ghci> type GHC.Bits.Bits :: * -> Constraint
class Eq a => GHC.Bits.Bits a where
  (GHC.Bits..&.) :: a -> a -> a
  (GHC.Bits..|.) :: a -> a -> a
  GHC.Bits.xor :: a -> a -> a
  GHC.Bits.complement :: a -> a
  GHC.Bits.shift :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.rotate :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.zeroBits :: a
  GHC.Bits.bit :: Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.setBit :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.clearBit :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.complementBit :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.testBit :: a -> Int -> Bool
  GHC.Bits.bitSizeMaybe :: a -> Maybe Int
  GHC.Bits.bitSize :: a -> Int
  GHC.Bits.isSigned :: a -> Bool
  GHC.Bits.shiftL :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.unsafeShiftL :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.shiftR :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.unsafeShiftR :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.rotateL :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.rotateR :: a -> Int -> a
  GHC.Bits.popCount :: a -> Int
  {-# MINIMAL (.&.), (.|.), xor, complement,
              (shift | shiftL, shiftR), (rotate | rotateL, rotateR), bitSize,
              bitSizeMaybe, isSigned, testBit, bit, popCount #-}
type GHC.Bits.FiniteBits :: * -> Constraint
class GHC.Bits.Bits b => GHC.Bits.FiniteBits b where
  GHC.Bits.finiteBitSize :: b -> Int
  GHC.Bits.countLeadingZeros :: b -> Int
  GHC.Bits.countTrailingZeros :: b -> Int
  {-# MINIMAL finiteBitSize #-}
GHC.Bits.bitDefault :: (GHC.Bits.Bits a, Num a) => Int -> a
GHC.Bits.popCountDefault :: (GHC.Bits.Bits a, Num a) => a -> Int
GHC.Bits.testBitDefault ::
  (GHC.Bits.Bits a, Num a) => a -> Int -> Bool
GHC.Bits.toIntegralSized ::
  (Integral a, Integral b, GHC.Bits.Bits a, GHC.Bits.Bits b) =>
  a -> Maybe b

ghci> type GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockReason :: *
data GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockReason
  = GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockedOnMVar
  | GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockedOnBlackHole
  | GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockedOnException
  | GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockedOnSTM
  | GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockedOnForeignCall
  | GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockedOnOther

  = GHC.Event.Windows.ConsoleEvent.ControlC
  | GHC.Event.Windows.ConsoleEvent.Break
  | GHC.Event.Windows.ConsoleEvent.Close
  | GHC.Event.Windows.ConsoleEvent.Logoff
  | GHC.Event.Windows.ConsoleEvent.Shutdown

                               ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.RealWorld,
                             a #))

  = GHC.Conc.Sync.TVar (ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.TVar#
                          ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.RealWorld a)

data GHC.Conc.Sync.ThreadId
  = GHC.Conc.Sync.ThreadId ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.ThreadId#
type GHC.Conc.Sync.ThreadStatus :: *
data GHC.Conc.Sync.ThreadStatus
  = GHC.Conc.Sync.ThreadRunning
  | GHC.Conc.Sync.ThreadFinished
  | GHC.Conc.Sync.ThreadBlocked GHC.Conc.Sync.BlockReason
  | GHC.Conc.Sync.ThreadDied

ghci> --- Package: base | Module: GHC.Enum ---
ghci> type Bounded :: * -> Constraint
class Bounded a where
  minBound :: a
  maxBound :: a
  {-# MINIMAL minBound, maxBound #-}
type Enum :: * -> Constraint
class Enum a where
  succ :: a -> a
  pred :: a -> a
  toEnum :: Int -> a
  fromEnum :: a -> Int
  enumFrom :: a -> [a]
  enumFromThen :: a -> a -> [a]
  enumFromTo :: a -> a -> [a]
  enumFromThenTo :: a -> a -> a -> [a]
  {-# MINIMAL toEnum, fromEnum #-}
GHC.Enum.boundedEnumFrom :: (Enum a, Bounded a) => a -> [a]
GHC.Enum.boundedEnumFromThen ::
  (Enum a, Bounded a) => a -> a -> [a]
GHC.Enum.fromEnumError :: Show a => String -> a -> b
GHC.Enum.predError :: String -> a
GHC.Enum.succError :: String -> a
GHC.Enum.toEnumError :: Show a => String -> Int -> (a, a) -> b

type (~) :: forall k. k -> k -> Constraint
class (a ~ b) => (~) a b
type (~~) :: forall k0 k1. k0 -> k1 -> Constraint
class (a ~~ b) => (~~) a b

ghci> type GHC.Float.FFFormat :: *
data GHC.Float.FFFormat
  = GHC.Float.FFExponent | GHC.Float.FFFixed | GHC.Float.FFGeneric
type Floating :: * -> Constraint
class Fractional a => Floating a where
  pi :: a
  exp :: a -> a
  log :: a -> a
  sqrt :: a -> a
  (**) :: a -> a -> a
  logBase :: a -> a -> a
  sin :: a -> a
  cos :: a -> a
  tan :: a -> a
  asin :: a -> a
  acos :: a -> a
  atan :: a -> a
  sinh :: a -> a
  cosh :: a -> a
  tanh :: a -> a
  asinh :: a -> a
  acosh :: a -> a
  atanh :: a -> a
  GHC.Float.log1p :: a -> a
  GHC.Float.expm1 :: a -> a
  GHC.Float.log1pexp :: a -> a
  GHC.Float.log1mexp :: a -> a
  {-# MINIMAL pi, exp, log, sin, cos, asin, acos, atan, sinh, cosh,
              asinh, acosh, atanh #-}
type RealFloat :: * -> Constraint
class (RealFrac a, Floating a) => RealFloat a where
  floatRadix :: a -> Integer
  floatDigits :: a -> Int
  floatRange :: a -> (Int, Int)
  decodeFloat :: a -> (Integer, Int)
  encodeFloat :: Integer -> Int -> a
  exponent :: a -> Int
  significand :: a -> a
  scaleFloat :: Int -> a -> a
  isNaN :: a -> Bool
  isInfinite :: a -> Bool
  isDenormalized :: a -> Bool
  isNegativeZero :: a -> Bool
  isIEEE :: a -> Bool
  atan2 :: a -> a -> a
  {-# MINIMAL floatRadix, floatDigits, floatRange, decodeFloat,
              encodeFloat, isNaN, isInfinite, isDenormalized, isNegativeZero,
              isIEEE #-}

                          GHC.IO.Buffer.bufOffset :: {-# UNPACK #-}GHC.Word.Word64,
                          GHC.IO.Buffer.bufL :: {-# UNPACK #-}Int,
                          GHC.IO.Buffer.bufR :: {-# UNPACK #-}Int}
type GHC.IO.Buffer.BufferState :: *
data GHC.IO.Buffer.BufferState
  = GHC.IO.Buffer.ReadBuffer | GHC.IO.Buffer.WriteBuffer
type GHC.IO.Buffer.CharBufElem :: *
type GHC.IO.Buffer.CharBufElem = Char
type GHC.IO.Buffer.CharBuffer :: *
type GHC.IO.Buffer.CharBuffer = GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer Char
type GHC.IO.Buffer.RawBuffer :: * -> *
type GHC.IO.Buffer.RawBuffer e = GHC.ForeignPtr.ForeignPtr e
type GHC.IO.Buffer.RawCharBuffer :: *
type GHC.IO.Buffer.RawCharBuffer =
  GHC.IO.Buffer.RawBuffer GHC.IO.Buffer.CharBufElem

  Int -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e

  Int -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e

  Int -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e

  GHC.Word.Word64 -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e

  GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> GHC.Word.Word64
GHC.IO.Buffer.bufferRemove ::
  Int -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e
GHC.IO.Buffer.charSize :: Int
GHC.IO.Buffer.checkBuffer :: GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer a -> IO ()

  GHC.IO.Buffer.RawBuffer e
  -> Int -> GHC.IO.Buffer.BufferState -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e
GHC.IO.Buffer.isEmptyBuffer :: GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> Bool
GHC.IO.Buffer.isFullBuffer :: GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> Bool
GHC.IO.Buffer.isFullCharBuffer :: GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> Bool
GHC.IO.Buffer.isWriteBuffer :: GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> Bool

  Int
  -> Int -> GHC.IO.Buffer.BufferState -> IO (GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e)

  GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer e -> (GHC.Ptr.Ptr e -> IO a) -> IO a

ghci> --- Package: base | Module: GHC.IO.BufferedIO ---
ghci> type GHC.IO.BufferedIO.BufferedIO :: * -> Constraint
class GHC.IO.BufferedIO.BufferedIO dev where
  GHC.IO.BufferedIO.newBuffer :: dev
                                 -> GHC.IO.Buffer.BufferState
                                 -> IO (GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
  GHC.IO.BufferedIO.fillReadBuffer :: dev
                                      -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
                                      -> IO (Int, GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
  GHC.IO.BufferedIO.fillReadBuffer0 :: dev
                                       -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
                                       -> IO (Maybe Int, GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
  GHC.IO.BufferedIO.emptyWriteBuffer :: dev
                                        -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
                                        -> IO (GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
  GHC.IO.BufferedIO.flushWriteBuffer :: dev
                                        -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
                                        -> IO (GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
  GHC.IO.BufferedIO.flushWriteBuffer0 :: dev
                                         -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
                                         -> IO (Int, GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
  {-# MINIMAL newBuffer, fillReadBuffer, fillReadBuffer0,
              flushWriteBuffer, flushWriteBuffer0 #-}
GHC.IO.BufferedIO.readBuf ::
  GHC.IO.Device.RawIO dev =>
  dev
  -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
  -> IO (Int, GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
GHC.IO.BufferedIO.readBufNonBlocking ::
  GHC.IO.Device.RawIO dev =>
  dev
  -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
  -> IO (Maybe Int, GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
GHC.IO.BufferedIO.writeBuf ::
  GHC.IO.Device.RawIO dev =>
  dev
  -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
  -> IO (GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
GHC.IO.BufferedIO.writeBufNonBlocking ::
  GHC.IO.Device.RawIO dev =>
  dev
  -> GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8
  -> IO (Int, GHC.IO.Buffer.Buffer GHC.Word.Word8)
ghci> --- Package: base | Module: GHC.IO.Device ---
ghci> type GHC.IO.Device.IODevice :: * -> Constraint
class GHC.IO.Device.IODevice a where
  GHC.IO.Device.ready :: a -> Bool -> Int -> IO Bool
  GHC.IO.Device.close :: a -> IO ()
  GHC.IO.Device.isTerminal :: a -> IO Bool
  GHC.IO.Device.isSeekable :: a -> IO Bool
  GHC.IO.Device.seek :: a
                        -> GHC.IO.Device.SeekMode -> Integer -> IO Integer
  GHC.IO.Device.tell :: a -> IO Integer
  GHC.IO.Device.getSize :: a -> IO Integer
  GHC.IO.Device.setSize :: a -> Integer -> IO ()
  GHC.IO.Device.setEcho :: a -> Bool -> IO ()
  GHC.IO.Device.getEcho :: a -> IO Bool
  GHC.IO.Device.setRaw :: a -> Bool -> IO ()
  GHC.IO.Device.devType :: a -> IO GHC.IO.Device.IODeviceType
  GHC.IO.Device.dup :: a -> IO a
  GHC.IO.Device.dup2 :: a -> a -> IO a
  {-# MINIMAL ready, close, devType #-}
type GHC.IO.Device.IODeviceType :: *
data GHC.IO.Device.IODeviceType
  = GHC.IO.Device.Directory
  | GHC.IO.Device.Stream
  | GHC.IO.Device.RegularFile
  | GHC.IO.Device.RawDevice
type GHC.IO.Device.RawIO :: * -> Constraint
class GHC.IO.Device.RawIO a where
  GHC.IO.Device.read :: a
                        -> GHC.Ptr.Ptr GHC.Word.Word8 -> GHC.Word.Word64 -> Int -> IO Int
  GHC.IO.Device.readNonBlocking :: a
                                   -> GHC.Ptr.Ptr GHC.Word.Word8
                                   -> GHC.Word.Word64
                                   -> Int
                                   -> IO (Maybe Int)
  GHC.IO.Device.write :: a
                         -> GHC.Ptr.Ptr GHC.Word.Word8 -> GHC.Word.Word64 -> Int -> IO ()
  GHC.IO.Device.writeNonBlocking :: a
                                    -> GHC.Ptr.Ptr GHC.Word.Word8
                                    -> GHC.Word.Word64
                                    -> Int
                                    -> IO Int
  {-# MINIMAL read, readNonBlocking, write, writeNonBlocking #-}
type GHC.IO.Device.SeekMode :: *
data GHC.IO.Device.SeekMode
  = GHC.IO.Device.AbsoluteSeek
  | GHC.IO.Device.RelativeSeek
  | GHC.IO.Device.SeekFromEnd

  | GHC.IO.Exception.ResourceExhausted
  | GHC.IO.Exception.EOF

ghci> --- Package: base | Module: GHC.Real ---
ghci> (GHC.Real.%) :: Integral a => a -> a -> GHC.Real.Ratio a
type Fractional :: * -> Constraint
class Num a => Fractional a where
  (/) :: a -> a -> a
  recip :: a -> a
  fromRational :: Rational -> a
  {-# MINIMAL fromRational, (recip | (/)) #-}
type GHC.Real.FractionalExponentBase :: *
data GHC.Real.FractionalExponentBase
  = GHC.Real.Base2 | GHC.Real.Base10
type Integral :: * -> Constraint
class (Real a, Enum a) => Integral a where
  quot :: a -> a -> a
  rem :: a -> a -> a
  div :: a -> a -> a
  mod :: a -> a -> a
  quotRem :: a -> a -> (a, a)
  divMod :: a -> a -> (a, a)
  toInteger :: a -> Integer
  {-# MINIMAL quotRem, toInteger #-}
type GHC.Real.Ratio :: * -> *
data GHC.Real.Ratio a = !a GHC.Real.:% !a
type Rational :: *
type Rational = GHC.Real.Ratio Integer
type Real :: * -> Constraint
class (Num a, Ord a) => Real a where
  toRational :: a -> Rational
  {-# MINIMAL toRational #-}
type RealFrac :: * -> Constraint
class (Real a, Fractional a) => RealFrac a where
  properFraction :: Integral b => a -> (b, a)
  truncate :: Integral b => a -> b
  round :: Integral b => a -> b
  ceiling :: Integral b => a -> b
  floor :: Integral b => a -> b
  {-# MINIMAL properFraction #-}
(^) :: (Num a, Integral b) => a -> b -> a
(GHC.Real.^%^) :: Integral a => Rational -> a -> Rational
(^^) :: (Fractional a, Integral b) => a -> b -> a
(GHC.Real.^^%^^) :: Integral a => Rational -> a -> Rational
GHC.Real.denominator :: GHC.Real.Ratio a -> a
GHC.Real.divZeroError :: a
even :: Integral a => a -> Bool
fromIntegral :: (Integral a, Num b) => a -> b
gcd :: Integral a => a -> a -> a
GHC.Real.infinity :: Rational
GHC.Real.integralEnumFrom :: (Integral a, Bounded a) => a -> [a]

  (Integral a, Bounded a) => a -> a -> [a]

lcm :: Integral a => a -> a -> a

GHC.Real.mkRationalBase2 :: Rational -> Integer -> Rational

ghci> type role GHC.ST.ST nominal representational
type GHC.ST.ST :: * -> * -> *
newtype GHC.ST.ST s a = GHC.ST.ST (GHC.ST.STRep s a)
type GHC.ST.STRep :: * -> * -> *
type GHC.ST.STRep s a =
  ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.State# s
  -> (# ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.State# s, a #)
type role GHC.ST.STret nominal representational
type GHC.ST.STret :: * -> * -> *
data GHC.ST.STret s a
  = GHC.ST.STret (ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.State# s) a
GHC.ST.liftST ::
  GHC.ST.ST s a
  -> ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.State# s -> GHC.ST.STret s a

GHC.ST.unsafeInterleaveST :: GHC.ST.ST s a -> GHC.ST.ST s a

ghci> --- Package: base | Module: GHC.TypeError ---
ghci> type GHC.TypeError.Assert :: Bool -> Constraint -> Constraint
type family GHC.TypeError.Assert check errMsg where
    GHC.TypeError.Assert True _1 = () :: Constraint
    GHC.TypeError.Assert _1 errMsg = errMsg
type GHC.TypeError.ErrorMessage :: *
data GHC.TypeError.ErrorMessage
  = GHC.TypeError.Text ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol
  | forall t. GHC.TypeError.ShowType t
  | GHC.TypeError.ErrorMessage
    GHC.TypeError.:<>:
    GHC.TypeError.ErrorMessage
  | GHC.TypeError.ErrorMessage
    GHC.TypeError.:$$:
    GHC.TypeError.ErrorMessage
type GHC.TypeError.TypeError :: forall b.
                                GHC.TypeError.ErrorMessage -> b
type family GHC.TypeError.TypeError a where

type family GHC.TypeLits.AppendSymbol a b

type family GHC.TypeLits.CharToNat a

                                -> ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol
                                -> ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol
type family GHC.TypeLits.ConsSymbol a b
type GHC.TypeLits.KnownChar :: Char -> Constraint
class GHC.TypeLits.KnownChar n where
  GHC.TypeLits.charSing :: GHC.TypeLits.SChar n
  {-# MINIMAL charSing #-}
type GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol
                                 -> Constraint
class GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol n where
  GHC.TypeLits.symbolSing :: GHC.TypeLits.SSymbol n
  {-# MINIMAL symbolSing #-}
type GHC.TypeLits.NatToChar :: GHC.Num.Natural.Natural -> Char
type family GHC.TypeLits.NatToChar a
pattern GHC.TypeLits.SChar
  :: () => GHC.TypeLits.KnownChar c => GHC.TypeLits.SChar c
type role GHC.TypeLits.SChar phantom
type GHC.TypeLits.SChar :: Char -> *
newtype GHC.TypeLits.SChar s = GHC.TypeLits.UnsafeSChar Char
pattern GHC.TypeLits.SSymbol
  :: () => GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol s => GHC.TypeLits.SSymbol s
type role GHC.TypeLits.SSymbol phantom
type GHC.TypeLits.SSymbol :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> *
newtype GHC.TypeLits.SSymbol s = GHC.TypeLits.UnsafeSSymbol String
type GHC.TypeLits.SomeChar :: *
data GHC.TypeLits.SomeChar
  = forall (n :: Char).
    GHC.TypeLits.KnownChar n =>
    GHC.TypeLits.SomeChar (Data.Proxy.Proxy n)
type GHC.TypeLits.SomeSymbol :: *
data GHC.TypeLits.SomeSymbol
  = forall (n :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol).
    GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol n =>
    GHC.TypeLits.SomeSymbol (Data.Proxy.Proxy n)
type GHC.TypeLits.UnconsSymbol :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol
                                  -> Maybe (Char, ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol)
type family GHC.TypeLits.UnconsSymbol a
GHC.TypeLits.charVal :: GHC.TypeLits.KnownChar n => proxy n -> Char
GHC.TypeLits.charVal' ::
  GHC.TypeLits.KnownChar n =>
  ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Prim.Proxy# n -> Char
GHC.TypeLits.cmpChar ::
  (GHC.TypeLits.KnownChar a, GHC.TypeLits.KnownChar b) =>
  proxy1 a -> proxy2 b -> Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a b
GHC.TypeLits.cmpSymbol ::
  (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol a, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol b) =>
  proxy1 a -> proxy2 b -> Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a b
GHC.TypeLits.fromSChar :: GHC.TypeLits.SChar c -> Char
GHC.TypeLits.fromSNat :: GHC.TypeNats.SNat n -> Integer
GHC.TypeLits.fromSSymbol :: GHC.TypeLits.SSymbol s -> String
GHC.TypeLits.natVal ::
  GHC.TypeNats.KnownNat n => proxy n -> Integer

type role Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI nominal nominal
type Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI :: forall {k}. k -> k -> *
data Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a b where
  Data.Type.Ord.LTI :: forall {k} (a :: k) (b :: k).
                       (Data.Type.Ord.Compare a b ~ LT) =>
                       Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a b
  Data.Type.Ord.EQI :: forall {k} (a :: k).
                       (Data.Type.Ord.Compare a a ~ EQ) =>
                       Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a a
  Data.Type.Ord.GTI :: forall {k} (a :: k) (b :: k).
                       (Data.Type.Ord.Compare a b ~ GT) =>
                       Data.Type.Ord.OrderingI a b

type Applicative :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Functor f => Applicative f where
  pure :: a -> f a
  (<*>) :: f (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
  liftA2 :: (a -> b -> c) -> f a -> f b -> f c
  (*>) :: f a -> f b -> f b
  (<*) :: f a -> f b -> f a
  {-# MINIMAL pure, ((<*>) | liftA2) #-}

type Foldable :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Foldable t where
  Data.Foldable.fold :: Monoid m => t m -> m
  foldMap :: Monoid m => (a -> m) -> t a -> m
  Data.Foldable.foldMap' :: Monoid m => (a -> m) -> t a -> m
  foldr :: (a -> b -> b) -> b -> t a -> b
  Data.Foldable.foldr' :: (a -> b -> b) -> b -> t a -> b
  foldl :: (b -> a -> b) -> b -> t a -> b
  Data.Foldable.foldl' :: (b -> a -> b) -> b -> t a -> b
  foldr1 :: (a -> a -> a) -> t a -> a
  foldl1 :: (a -> a -> a) -> t a -> a
  Data.Foldable.toList :: t a -> [a]
  null :: t a -> Bool
  length :: t a -> Int
  elem :: Eq a => a -> t a -> Bool
  maximum :: Ord a => t a -> a
  minimum :: Ord a => t a -> a
  sum :: Num a => t a -> a
  product :: Num a => t a -> a
  {-# MINIMAL foldMap | foldr #-}
type Fractional :: * -> Constraint
class Num a => Fractional a where
  (/) :: a -> a -> a
  recip :: a -> a
  fromRational :: Rational -> a
  {-# MINIMAL fromRational, (recip | (/)) #-}

  (<$) :: a -> f b -> f a
  {-# MINIMAL fmap #-}

type Integral :: * -> Constraint
class (Real a, Enum a) => Integral a where
  quot :: a -> a -> a
  rem :: a -> a -> a
  div :: a -> a -> a
  mod :: a -> a -> a
  quotRem :: a -> a -> (a, a)
  divMod :: a -> a -> (a, a)

data Maybe a = Nothing | Just a
type Monad :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Applicative m => Monad m where
  (>>=) :: m a -> (a -> m b) -> m b
  (>>) :: m a -> m b -> m b
  return :: a -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL (>>=) #-}

  fail :: String -> m a

  mempty :: a

  {-# MINIMAL mempty | mconcat #-}

  (*) :: a -> a -> a

  abs :: a -> a

  {-# MINIMAL (+), (*), abs, signum, fromInteger, (negate | (-)) #-}
type Ord :: * -> Constraint

  (<=) :: a -> a -> Bool
  (>) :: a -> a -> Bool
  (>=) :: a -> a -> Bool
  max :: a -> a -> a
  min :: a -> a -> a
  {-# MINIMAL compare | (<=) #-}

  sequence :: Monad m => t (m a) -> m (t a)
  {-# MINIMAL traverse | sequenceA #-}

type IOError :: *
type IOError = GHC.IO.Exception.IOException
type GHC.IO.Exception.IOErrorType :: *
data GHC.IO.Exception.IOErrorType
  = GHC.IO.Exception.AlreadyExists
  | GHC.IO.Exception.NoSuchThing
  | GHC.IO.Exception.ResourceBusy
  | GHC.IO.Exception.ResourceExhausted
  | GHC.IO.Exception.EOF
  | GHC.IO.Exception.IllegalOperation
  | GHC.IO.Exception.PermissionDenied
  | GHC.IO.Exception.UserError
  | GHC.IO.Exception.UnsatisfiedConstraints
  | GHC.IO.Exception.SystemError
  | GHC.IO.Exception.ProtocolError
  | GHC.IO.Exception.OtherError
  | GHC.IO.Exception.InvalidArgument
  | GHC.IO.Exception.InappropriateType
  | GHC.IO.Exception.HardwareFault
  | GHC.IO.Exception.UnsupportedOperation
  | GHC.IO.Exception.TimeExpired
  | GHC.IO.Exception.ResourceVanished
  | GHC.IO.Exception.Interrupted
ioError :: IOError -> IO a
userError :: String -> IOError

  | Data.IntMap.Internal.Nil

type Data.IntMap.Internal.IntMap :: * -> *
data Data.IntMap.Internal.IntMap a
  = Data.IntMap.Internal.Bin {-# UNPACK #-}Data.IntMap.Internal.Prefix
                             {-# UNPACK #-}Data.IntMap.Internal.Mask
                             !(Data.IntMap.Internal.IntMap a)
                             !(Data.IntMap.Internal.IntMap a)

ghci> type role Control.Monad.Accum.LiftingAccum representational nominal nominal
type Control.Monad.Accum.LiftingAccum :: ((* -> *) -> * -> *)
                                         -> (* -> *) -> * -> *
newtype Control.Monad.Accum.LiftingAccum t m a
  = Control.Monad.Accum.LiftingAccum (t m a)
type Control.Monad.Accum.MonadAccum :: * -> (* -> *) -> Constraint
class (Monoid w, Monad m) =>
      Control.Monad.Accum.MonadAccum w m | m -> w where
  Control.Monad.Accum.look :: m w
  Control.Monad.Accum.add :: w -> m ()
  Control.Monad.Accum.accum :: (w -> (a, w)) -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL accum | look, add #-}
Control.Monad.Accum.looks ::
  Control.Monad.Accum.MonadAccum w m => (w -> a) -> m a
ghci> --- Package: mtl | Module: Control.Monad.Cont ---
ghci> type Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont :: * -> * -> *
type Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont r =
  Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT r Data.Functor.Identity.Identity
  :: * -> *
type role Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT nominal representational representational
type Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT :: forall {k}.
                                       k -> (k -> *) -> * -> *
newtype Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT r m a
  = Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT {Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.runContT :: (a
                                                                          -> m r)
                                                                         -> m r}
type Control.Monad.Cont.Class.MonadCont :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Monad m => Control.Monad.Cont.Class.MonadCont m where
  Control.Monad.Cont.Class.callCC :: ((a -> m b) -> m a) -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL callCC #-}
Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.cont ::
  ((a -> r) -> r) -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont r a
Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.evalCont ::
  Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont r r -> r
Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.evalContT ::
  Monad m => Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT r m r -> m r
Control.Monad.Cont.Class.label ::
  Control.Monad.Cont.Class.MonadCont m => a -> m (a -> m b, a)
Control.Monad.Cont.Class.label_ ::
  Control.Monad.Cont.Class.MonadCont m => m (m a)
Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.mapCont ::
  (r -> r)
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont r a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont r a
Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.mapContT ::
  forall {k} (m :: k -> *) (r :: k) a.
  (m r -> m r)
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT r m a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT r m a
Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.runCont ::
  Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont r a -> (a -> r) -> r
Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.withCont ::
  ((b -> r) -> a -> r)
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont r a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.Cont r b
Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.withContT ::
  forall {k} b (m :: k -> *) (r :: k) a.
  ((b -> m r) -> a -> m r)
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT r m a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Cont.ContT r m b

                                             -> (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Monad m =>
      Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m | m -> e where
  Control.Monad.Error.Class.throwError :: e -> m a
  Control.Monad.Error.Class.catchError :: m a -> (e -> m a) -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL throwError, catchError #-}

  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m =>
  (e -> m a) -> m a -> m a

  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m => Either e a -> m a

  (Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m,
   Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e' n) =>
  (m (Either e a) -> n (Either e' b)) -> m a -> n b

  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e' m =>
  (e -> e') -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a -> m a

  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m => m a -> m (Either e a)
Control.Monad.Error.Class.withError ::
  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m => (e -> e) -> m a -> m a

  :: * -> *

  = Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT (m (Either e a))
type Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError :: *
                                             -> (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Monad m =>
      Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m | m -> e where
  Control.Monad.Error.Class.throwError :: e -> m a
  Control.Monad.Error.Class.catchError :: m a -> (e -> m a) -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL throwError, catchError #-}
Control.Monad.Error.Class.handleError ::
  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m =>
  (e -> m a) -> m a -> m a

  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m => Either e a -> m a
Control.Monad.Error.Class.mapError ::
  (Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m,
   Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e' n) =>
  (m (Either e a) -> n (Either e' b)) -> m a -> n b
Control.Monad.Trans.Except.mapExcept ::
  (Either e a -> Either e' b)
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.Except e a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.Except e' b

  (m (Either e a) -> n (Either e' b))
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e' n b

  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e' m =>
  (e -> e') -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a -> m a

  Control.Monad.Trans.Except.Except e a -> Either e a
Control.Monad.Trans.Except.runExceptT ::
  Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a -> m (Either e a)
Control.Monad.Error.Class.tryError ::
  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m => m a -> m (Either e a)
Control.Monad.Error.Class.withError ::
  Control.Monad.Error.Class.MonadError e m => (e -> e) -> m a -> m a

  (e -> e')
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.Except e a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.Except e' a
Control.Monad.Trans.Except.withExceptT ::
  Functor m =>
  (e -> e')
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e' m a

  = Data.Functor.Identity.Identity {Data.Functor.Identity.runIdentity :: a}

                                               (k -> *) -> k -> *

  = Control.Monad.Trans.Identity.IdentityT {Control.Monad.Trans.Identity.runIdentityT :: f a}

  Control.Monad.Signatures.CallCC m a b
  -> Control.Monad.Signatures.CallCC
       (Control.Monad.Trans.Identity.IdentityT m) a b

  forall {k} e (m :: k -> *) (a :: k).
  Control.Monad.Signatures.Catch e m a
  -> Control.Monad.Signatures.Catch
       e (Control.Monad.Trans.Identity.IdentityT m) a

  forall {k1} {k2} (m :: k1 -> *) (a :: k1) (n :: k2 -> *) (b :: k2).

  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Identity.IdentityT n b

                                         -> * -> * -> (* -> *) -> Constraint

       Control.Monad.Writer.Class.MonadWriter w m,
       Control.Monad.State.Class.MonadState s m) =>
      Control.Monad.RWS.Class.MonadRWS r w s m | m -> r, m -> w, m -> s
type Control.Monad.Reader.Class.MonadReader :: *
                                               -> (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Monad m =>
      Control.Monad.Reader.Class.MonadReader r m | m -> r where
  Control.Monad.Reader.Class.ask :: m r
  Control.Monad.Reader.Class.local :: (r -> r) -> m a -> m a
  Control.Monad.Reader.Class.reader :: (r -> a) -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL (ask | reader), local #-}
type Control.Monad.State.Class.MonadState :: *
                                             -> (* -> *) -> Constraint
class Monad m =>
      Control.Monad.State.Class.MonadState s m | m -> s where
  Control.Monad.State.Class.get :: m s
  Control.Monad.State.Class.put :: s -> m ()
  Control.Monad.State.Class.state :: (s -> (a, s)) -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL state | get, put #-}
type Control.Monad.Trans.Class.MonadTrans :: ((* -> *) -> * -> *)
                                             -> Constraint
class (forall (m :: * -> *). Monad m => Monad (t m)) =>
      Control.Monad.Trans.Class.MonadTrans t where
  Control.Monad.Trans.Class.lift :: Monad m => m a -> t m a
  {-# MINIMAL lift #-}
type Control.Monad.Writer.Class.MonadWriter :: *
                                               -> (* -> *) -> Constraint
class (Monoid w, Monad m) =>
      Control.Monad.Writer.Class.MonadWriter w m | m -> w where
  Control.Monad.Writer.Class.writer :: (a, w) -> m a
  Control.Monad.Writer.Class.tell :: w -> m ()
  Control.Monad.Writer.Class.listen :: m a -> m (a, w)
  Control.Monad.Writer.Class.pass :: m (a, w -> w) -> m a
  {-# MINIMAL (writer | tell), listen, pass #-}

    r w s Data.Functor.Identity.Identity
  :: * -> *

                                                                               -> s -> m (a, s, w)}

  -> Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Lazy.RWST r w s m a

  Control.Monad.State.Class.MonadState s m => (s -> s) -> m ()

  Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.CPS.RWST
    r w s Data.Functor.Identity.Identity
  :: * -> *

                                         -> * -> * -> (* -> *) -> * -> *

  = Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.CPS.RWST {Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.CPS.unRWST :: r

  | Data.Text.Internal.Encoding.Utf8.Reject

                                        {-# UNPACK #-}GHC.Word.Word8

                                        {-# UNPACK #-}GHC.Word.Word8

  = Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Scan1 {-# UNPACK #-}Char !s
  | Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Scan2 {-# UNPACK #-}Char !s
type Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Step :: * -> * -> *
data Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Step s a
  = Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Done
  | Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Skip !s
  | Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Yield !a !s
type Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Stream :: * -> *
data Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Stream a
  = forall s.
    Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Stream (s
                                            -> Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Step s a)
                                           !s
                                           !Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Size.Size

  Data.Text.Internal.Fusion.Types.Stream a

                                                                         -> m r}

type Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT :: * -> (* -> *) -> * -> *
newtype Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a
  = Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT (m (Either e a))

  Monad m =>
  Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a
  -> (e -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e' m a)
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e' m a

  Monad m => Either e a -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a

  Monad m =>
  Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m ()
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a

  Monad m =>
  (e -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e' m a)
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e' m a

  Control.Monad.Signatures.CallCC m (Either e a) (Either e b)
  -> Control.Monad.Signatures.CallCC
       (Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m) a b

  Monad m =>
  Control.Monad.Signatures.Listen w m (Either e a)
  -> Control.Monad.Signatures.Listen
       w (Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m) a

  Monad m =>
  Control.Monad.Signatures.Pass w m (Either e a)
  -> Control.Monad.Signatures.Pass
       w (Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m) a

  (Either e a -> Either e' b)
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.Except e a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.Except e' b

  (m (Either e a) -> n (Either e' b))
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e' n b

  Control.Monad.Trans.Except.Except e a -> Either e a

  Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a -> m (Either e a)

  Monad m => e -> Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a

  Monad m =>
  Control.Monad.Trans.Except.ExceptT e m a

  (e -> e')

  Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Lazy.RWS r w s a -> r -> s -> (a, s, w)

  (r -> s -> (a, s, w)) -> Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Lazy.RWS r w s a

  (Monoid w, Monad m) =>
  (s -> (a, s)) -> Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Lazy.RWST r w s m a

  Monad m => w -> Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Lazy.RWST r w s m ()

  -> Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Lazy.RWS r w s a
  -> Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Lazy.RWS r' w s a

    r w s Data.Functor.Identity.Identity
  :: * -> *

                                            -> * -> * -> (* -> *) -> * -> *

  = Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Strict.RWST {Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Strict.runRWST :: r
                                                                                   -> s
                                                                                   -> m (a, s, w)}

  (Monoid w, Monad m) =>
  Control.Monad.Trans.RWS.Strict.RWST r w s m r

    w Data.Functor.Identity.Identity
  :: * -> *

                                                -> (* -> *) -> * -> *

  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Writer.Lazy.WriterT w m a

  -> Control.Monad.Trans.Writer.Lazy.Writer w a

  (a, w) -> Control.Monad.Trans.Writer.CPS.WriterT w m a

  (Functor m, Monoid w) =>
  m (a, w) -> Control.Monad.Trans.Writer.CPS.WriterT w m a
